fieldTestProtocol: 5 min hard effort, then 5 min easy (not scored, just clears the legs)
20-minute time trial: hardest STEADY effort you can sustain the entire 20 min — even pacing, not a sprint
Average HR of those 20 minutes = your estimated LTHR
10 min cool-down. Record the number — every future indoor session is calculated from it.

redFlags.label: Tendon pain elevated
redFlags.rule: Next-day tendon pain > 5/10, OR next-day pain has risen on each of the last 3 logged days
redFlags.action: Switch to isometric-only loading for 3–5 days (e.g. Spanish squat holds, 5x45s) before resuming normal strength progression.

redFlags.label: Ankle red flag
redFlags.rule: Swelling logged, OR giving-way logged, OR pain with normal weight-bearing logged
redFlags.action: Stop loading that joint. Get reassessed by your treating physio/physician before resuming ankle progression.

redFlags.label: Recovery markers flagged
redFlags.rule: Today's HRV is down more than 20–25% vs. the trailing 7-day average AND today's RHR is up 5–7+ bpm vs. the trailing 7-day average, on 2 or more consecutive logged days
redFlags.action: Swap today's hard/key session for an easy day or full rest.

redFlags.label: Session harder than expected
redFlags.rule: 'Felt harder than it should have' self-report checked on 2+ training days within the last 7 logged days
redFlags.action: Possible overreaching — add an extra rest day, or consider pulling the next scheduled deload forward.

redFlags.label: Unintended weight loss
redFlags.rule: Logged body weight down more than 1% in a rolling 7-day window, sustained across 2 consecutive 7-day windows
redFlags.action: Increase daily carbohydrate intake — you're likely under-fueling relative to training load.

nutrition: Daily: 5–7 g/kg carbs (420–590g) on normal days, 8–10 g/kg (670–840g) on long-ride/peak/race-load days. Protein 1.8–2.0 g/kg (150–170g).
Pre-ride: 1–3 g/kg carbs, 1–4h out (bagel + banana works well).
During rides > 90 min: 60–90 g carbs/hr + sodium bottle (700–1500 mg/L — heavy/salty sweater profile).
Post-ride: 1–1.2 g/kg carbs + 0.3–0.4 g/kg protein within 30–45 min (milk + banana + oatmeal works well).
Creatine 5g/day, post-workout. Caffeine ~3mg/kg pre-key-sessions and race day only (not daily).
Cramp rescue in-race: pickle juice or mustard packet at the first twinge.

days.title: Easy Recovery / Mobility (20–30 min)
days.details: Optional 20 min Z1 spin, or full rest. 10–15 min mobility: hip flexor/quad/calf + ankle balance work.

days.title: Full Rest
days.details: No structured training. Optional: 10 min ankle proprioception/balance at home (no gym needed). Bank recovery — tomorrow is a two-part gym day.

days.title: GYM — Indoor Bike + Upper/Core (~90 min)
days.details: PART 1 — LTHR Field Test (45 min): 15 min progressive warm-up (cadence 85–95rpm). 5 min hard effort, then 5 min easy (not scored). 20-MIN TIME TRIAL: hardest steady effort sustainable for the full 20 min — even pacing, not a sprint. Average HR of those 20 min = your estimated LTHR — enter it in Settings, it sets every indoor zone through Week 4. 10 min cool-down. PART 2 — Upper Body/Core (45 min): Band ER/IR 3x15. Face pulls 3x12. OH press (light) 3x8. Landmine press 3x8. Dead bug + side plank 3x each. Ankle proprioception 10 min after.

days.title: OUTDOOR — SFU Hill Climb (55–60 min)
days.details: 15 min WU. SFU Hill Climb x1 @ 210–225W, seated, cadence >70rpm. 15–20 min easy spin back.

days.title: Rest / Mobility
days.details: 10–15 min mobility (hip flexor/quad/calf) + balance work. Full rest preferred; optional 20 min Z1 spin only if legs feel fresh.

days.title: OUTDOOR — Long Ride 1:30 (~30km)
days.details: Full Z2, 150–190W, conversational pace. Test your DIY electrolyte bottle recipe for the first time.

days.title: Golf + GYM — Lower-Body Strength (55 min)
days.details: Golf 9:15–10:15am. Then: WU 5 min + mobility. Leg press or Spanish squat, 3s down/2s up, depth capped at 60–70° flexion, 4x8 @ RPE 6. Split squat 3x8/side. RDL 3x8. Calf raise 4x12. Band ankle inv/ev 3x15/side. Single-leg balance 3x30s/side. Pallof press 3x10/side. This follows yesterday's long ride — if legs are trashed, cut load ~20% rather than skipping.

days.title: Easy Recovery / Mobility (20–25 min)
days.details: Optional 20–25 min Z1 spin, or full rest. Mobility + ankle balance work.

days.title: Full Rest
days.details: No structured training. Optional 10 min ankle proprioception at home.

days.title: GYM — Indoor Bike + Upper/Core (~105 min)
days.details: PART 1 — Sweet Spot (60 min): 15 min WU Z1–2. 3x8 min @ Zone 4/Sweet Spot (95–99% LTHR), RPE 6–7, cadence 90–95rpm, 4 min Z2 recovery between. 10 min CD. PART 2 — Upper Body/Core (45 min): same as Week 1, +1 set on each exercise. Ankle proprioception 10 min.

days.title: OUTDOOR — SFU Hill Climb (70–75 min)
days.details: 15 min WU. SFU x2 @ 225–245W, full recovery descent between reps. 15 min CD.

days.title: Rest / Mobility
days.details: Mobility work. Optional 20–25 min Z1 spin.

days.title: OUTDOOR — Long Ride 2:00 (~45km)
days.details: Z2, 165–195W. Fueling rehearsal: 40–60g carb/hr. Note any cramp warning signs.

days.title: Golf + GYM — Lower-Body Strength (60 min)
days.details: Golf 9:15–10:15am. Then: if next-day pain returned to baseline all week, progress depth toward 80–90° and load +5–10%. Leg press/Spanish squat 4x8. Split squat 3x10/side. RDL 3x10. Single-leg calf raise 4x12. Band ankle work 3x15/side. Single-leg balance, eyes closed, 3x30s. Pallof press 3x12/side.

days.title: Easy Recovery / Mobility (20–25 min)
days.details: Optional spin or full rest. Mobility work.

days.title: Full Rest
days.details: No structured training. Optional 10 min ankle proprioception at home.

days.title: GYM — Indoor Bike + Upper/Core (~120 min)
days.details: PART 1 — Sweet Spot (70 min): 15 min WU. 3x10 min @ Zone 4/Sweet Spot (95–99% LTHR), RPE 6–7, 5 min recovery between. 10 min CD. PART 2 — Upper Body/Core (50 min): add load to landmine press. Ankle proprioception 10 min.

days.title: OUTDOOR — SFU Hill Climb (85–90 min)
days.details: 15 min WU. SFU x2–3 @ 235–255W. 15–20 min CD.

days.title: Rest / Mobility
days.details: Mobility only — no bike or strength.

days.title: OUTDOOR — Long Ride 2:30 (~58km)
days.details: Z2, 170–200W + 2x8 min tempo surge @ 210–225W mid-ride. Full fueling rehearsal: 60g carb/hr + sodium bottle.

days.title: Golf + GYM — Lower-Body Strength (65 min)
days.details: Golf 9:15–10:15am. Then: progress load if pain criteria still being met. Leg press 4x8 heavier. Split squat 3x10. RDL 3x10. Single-leg calf raise 4x15. Add low-amplitude pogo hops 2x10 ONLY if pain has been ≤3/10 during and resolved by next morning for 10+ straight days — otherwise skip and stay isotonic. Yesterday was a bigger ride (2:30 + surges) — autoregulate load down if legs are cooked.

days.title: Full Rest / Light Mobility
days.details: No structured training. Gentle mobility only.

days.title: Full Rest
days.details: No structured training.

days.title: GYM — Indoor Bike + Upper/Core (~80 min, reduced)
days.details: PART 1 (45 min): 15 min WU. 2x8 min @ Zone 3/Tempo (90–94% LTHR), RPE 5–6. 10 min CD. Keep it genuinely easy. PART 2 — Upper Body/Core (35 min): reduce volume ~30% vs. Week 3.

days.title: OUTDOOR — SFU Hill Climb (45 min)
days.details: SFU x1 @ 200–215W, steady — no pushing.

days.title: Full Rest
days.details: No training. Prioritize sleep.

days.title: OUTDOOR — Long Ride 1:45 easy (~35km)
days.details: Z2, 150–180W only — no intervals, recovery-focused.

days.title: Golf + GYM — Lower-Body Strength (40 min) + CHECK-IN
days.details: Golf 9:15–10:15am. Then: reduce load ~30–40%. Isometric emphasis: Spanish squat holds 5x45s. Light balance work only. CHECK-IN: review this week's pain trend, HRV trend, and ankle status before advancing to Week 5 — do not progress if any are still flagged.

days.title: Easy Recovery / Mobility (20–30 min)
days.details: Optional Z1 spin or rest. Mobility + ankle work.

days.title: Full Rest
days.details: No structured training. Bank recovery — tomorrow includes your LTHR retest.

days.title: GYM — LTHR Retest + Upper/Core (~135 min)
days.details: PART 1 — LTHR Retest (45 min): same protocol as Week 1 (15 min WU, 20-min TT, avg HR = new LTHR). Enter the new number in Settings — it drives Weeks 5–8. PART 2 — Upper Body/Core (50 min): add light medicine ball chest pass 2x8 if shoulder is pain-free.

days.title: OUTDOOR — SFU Hill Climb (95 min)
days.details: 15 min WU. SFU x3 @ 240–260W. 20 min CD.

days.title: Rest / Mobility
days.details: Mobility. Optional 25 min Z1 spin.

days.title: OUTDOOR — Long Ride 3:00 (~70km)
days.details: Z2, 175–205W + 3x10 min race-pace surges @ 215–230W. Full fueling/electrolyte rehearsal.

days.title: Golf + GYM — Lower-Body Strength (65 min)
days.details: Golf 9:15–10:15am. Then: resume progressive loading. Leg press/Spanish squat 4x8–10 heavier. Split squat 3x10. RDL 3x10. Single-leg calf raise 4x15. Hop-to-stick 2x8 if ankle/tendon criteria met. Yesterday's long ride (3:00) was your biggest yet — reduce today's load if legs are flat.

days.title: Easy Recovery / Mobility (25–30 min)
days.details: Optional easy spin or rest. Mobility + ankle work. Absorb yesterday's long ride + strength double-header.

days.title: Full Rest
days.details: No structured training. Bank recovery — tomorrow's combined gym day precedes your toughest hill session.

days.title: GYM — Indoor Threshold + Upper/Core (~135 min)
days.details: PART 1 — Threshold (85 min): 15 min WU. 3x12 min @ Zone 5a/Threshold (100–102% LTHR), RPE 7–8, 5 min recovery between. 10 min CD. PART 2 — Upper Body/Core (50 min): jump-land mechanics drill if cleared: low box step-offs, soft-landing focus, 2x8. Pace Part 1 honestly — tomorrow's hill session is the harder priority.

days.title: OUTDOOR — SFU Hill Climb (105–110 min)
days.details: 15 min WU. SFU x3–4 @ 245–265W — race-climbing simulation. 20 min CD. If yesterday's gym day left your legs heavy, dial this back toward tempo effort rather than forcing threshold — protect Saturday's key ride.

days.title: Rest — Protect This Day
days.details: Full rest. Biggest ride of the block is tomorrow.

days.title: KEY SESSION — OUTDOOR Long Ride 3:45–4:00 (~90–95km)
days.details: Full race simulation. Z2 175–205W base, climbing sections 210–235W. Execute the complete race-day fueling plan (60–90g carb/hr, sodium hourly). Test your race-morning breakfast today. This ride is your best predictor of race readiness.

days.title: Golf + GYM — Lower-Body Strength (65 min)
days.details: Golf 9:15–10:15am. Then: peak loads. Lateral bounds 2x8/side if volleyball-cleared. Yesterday was your longest ride of the block (3:45–4:00) — if quads/tendons are flagging, cut load 20–30% or shift to isometric-only today rather than pushing through.

days.title: Easy Recovery / Mobility (20 min)
days.details: Optional easy spin. Mobility work.

days.title: Full Rest
days.details: No structured training.

days.title: GYM — Indoor Bike + Upper/Core (~90 min)
days.details: PART 1 — Sweet Spot (60 min): 15 min WU. 3x8 min @ Zone 4/Sweet Spot (95–99% LTHR), RPE 6–7, 4 min recovery. 10 min CD. PART 2 — Upper Body/Core (30 min): light session. Continue jump-land work if cleared.

days.title: OUTDOOR — SFU Hill Climb (75 min)
days.details: 15 min WU. SFU x2 @ 235–250W, race-pace. 15 min CD.

days.title: Rest
days.details: Full rest.

days.title: OUTDOOR — Long Ride 2:00–2:30 (~50–58km)
days.details: 3x10 min race-pace @ 215–230W, otherwise Z2.

days.title: Golf + GYM — Lower-Body Strength (40 min)
days.details: Golf 9:15–10:15am. Then: volume down ~35%. Keep load/intensity — sharpen quality, not fatigue.

days.title: Easy Recovery / Mobility (15–20 min)
days.details: Light mobility only. Legs should feel fresh, not worked.

days.title: Full Rest
days.details: No structured training.

days.title: GYM — Indoor Openers + Light Upper/Core (~60 min)
days.details: PART 1 — Openers (35 min): 15 min WU. 4x3 min @ Zone 5b/VO2max (103–106% LTHR), RPE 9, 3 min recovery. 10 min CD. PART 2 — Light Upper/Core (25 min): mobility focus.

days.title: OUTDOOR — SFU Hill Climb (45 min)
days.details: SFU x1 moderate @ 225–240W. CD.

days.title: Rest
days.details: Full rest.

days.title: OUTDOOR — Easy Ride (60–75 min)
days.details: Z2 with a few 2 min openers @ 260W. Relaxed.

days.title: Golf + Light Strength/Mobility (20–25 min)
days.details: Golf 9:15–10:15am. Reduced loads, movement quality only. Start easing carbs upward toward evening.

days.title: Full Rest
days.details: Or 20 min very easy spin. Light mobility. Normal (not yet elevated) carb intake.

days.title: OUTDOOR — Easy Spin + Openers (30 min)
days.details: 3x1 min openers @ 250W. Ankle proprioception 10 min.

days.title: Rest + Carb-Load Begins
days.details: Begin carb-load: 8–10 g/kg/day using rice, noodles, oatmeal, bagels.

days.title: Very Easy Spin (20 min)
days.details: Bike check: tires, gears, cleats. Continue carb-loading. Early night.

days.title: Full Rest
days.details: 10 min mobility only. Lay out kit, bottles, nutrition. Early to bed.

days.title: ★ RACE DAY — Target: sub-4:30
days.details: ~3–3.5h before: wake, eat oatmeal+banana+honey. ~90min before: stop solid food, sip electrolytes. 0–51km (coastal): Z2 170–200W, draft, conserve. ~51km Britannia Beach aid station: refill. 51–100km (Cheakamus Valley climbing): settle to 210–235W sustained, refuel every aid station (~25km spacing). 100–122km: manage effort into Whistler Village. Finish under 4:30.
